subcodes.first_line: We behold the mountains humbled and rent asunder through fear of God, yet the people rejoice in what they possess [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نری الجبال خاشعه متصدعه من خشیه الله ولکن الناس یفرحون بما عندهم و
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @living waters; water of life, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
